Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const css=fs.readFileSync\('craftbiz.css','utf8'\);let open=0,close=0;for\(const c of css\){if\(c==='{'\)open++;if\(c==='}'\)close++;}console.log\('Open braces:',open,'Close braces:',close,'Balanced:',open===close\);")
